mapper.select: SELECT live_session_id, product_id, status, started_at FROM live_session ORDER BY started_at DESC, live_session_id DESC
SELECT live_session_id, product_id, status, started_at FROM live_session WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 'ON_AIR' ORDER BY started_at DESC, live_session_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT live_session_id, product_id, status, started_at FROM live_session WHERE status = 'ON_AIR' ORDER BY started_at DESC, live_session_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO live_session (product_id, status, started_at) VALUES (#{productId}, #{status}, #{startedAt})
